title: leapp-repository  bug fix update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[0.22.0-1.0.7]
- Correctly process drgn package [Orabug: 38698236]
- Correctly process ipa-server update [Orabug: 38096687]
- Correctly process python3.12-typing-extensions [Orabug: 38671893]
- Restore and fix ISO upgrade inhibitor for special cases [Orabug: 38489510]
- Support additional migrations [Orabug: 38665636], [Orabug: 38662946]
- Support 9.7 and 10.1 [Orabug: 38544272], [Orabug: 38640771], [Orabug: 38452658]
- Remove unified-monitoring-agent on upgrade [Orabug: 38603872]
- Drop redundant firmware inhibitor [Orabug: 38636586]
